title: Usopp Chooses to Leave the Village Peacefully
description: On pages 13–16, the Syrup Village arc settles after Kuro’s defeat, focusing on Usopp’s decision, Kaya’s gratitude, and the end of the Usopp Pirates.
scene: The village chooses peace and secrecy while Usopp prepares to leave, turning his old lies into the beginning of a real journey.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, yes, you're all here

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You guys fought bravely

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: against those KURO neko pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp Pirate
dialogue.text: It was a battle worthy of the USOPP pirate group

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: I'm very proud as the captain!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: 5 years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: We formed the USOPPP pirate group when you guys were four

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: This was the greatest and most magnificent battle we have experienced in those 5 years

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: And now,

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: It's sudden but I have decided to go to the sea by myself

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I'm going to become a real pirate

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What...?

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: Captain?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: After seeing them, I decided

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm going to leave this village

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: There is only one reason!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Because the pirate flag is calling me!

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: Captain, that's a lie! That's also a lie, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: That's so sudden! Besides, don't you love this village, Captain?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp Pirate
dialogue.text: What's going to happen to usopp pirate group!?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Shanks for every- thing, guys

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I don't plan on telling the folks in the village, say bye to them for me

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: No...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: No, I don't want to say that!!!

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: Don't go, Captain

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Do you remember- her this place?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: This is where we first met

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hey, liar!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Who are you little brats?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: But you're famous for your lies

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Yeah, you're famous,

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I don't wanna hear that story!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp Pirate
dialogue.text: Okay, you can call me captain usopp from now on

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You guys are USOPP? Pirate Group!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Whaa...

summary: This part gives Syrup Village an emotional farewell: Usopp protects the village’s peace, says goodbye to his friends, and steps toward becoming a real pirate.
